dynamodb.globaltable.readprovisionedthro: Allows you to specify the read capacity settings for a replica table or a replica global secondary index when the `BillingMode` is set to `PROVISIONED`. You must specify a value for either `ReadCapacityUnits` or `ReadCapacityAutoScalingSettings`, but not both. You can switch between fixed capacity and auto scaling.

dynamodb.globaltable.readprovisionedthro.Description: Specifies auto scaling settings for the replica table or global secondary index.
Specifies a fixed read capacity for the replica table or global secondary index.
